1.description: Sample Paths of Seven Customers Served by the Same Agent (May 4, 2017) Note. Circles (squares) show when the customer (agent) sent a message, and × marks the conversation closure time.

2.description: Comparing the Distributions of the Number of Active Conversations and Assigned Conversations per Agent Note. The probability indicates the proportion of intervals with observed activity: May 22–31, 2017.

3.description: (Color online) Difference of Empirical CDFs for the Data and Simulated Conversation Models: Out-of-Sample Test Notes. (a) Conversation duration. (b) Gap time.

4.description: (Color online) Residual Analysis “Dial Plots” of Conditionally Uniform UHP-Transformed Empirical CDFs Compared with True Standard Uniform CDFs and 99% Kolmogorov-Smirnov Error Bounds: Out-of-Sample Test Notes. (a) N = 10. (b) N = 20. (c) N = 30.

5.description: (Color online) Percent Improvement of Wait Time Metrics for the LL+HP Policy Across a Range of Projection Interval δ , Plotted as an Area of the Minimum to Maximum Improvements at Each Maximum Concurrency Value Notes. (a) Mean outer wait ( 𝒮 = 1 2 5 S = 125 ). (b) Mean inner wait ( 𝒮 = 1 2 5 S = 125 ). (c) Probability of outer wait ( 𝒮 = 1 2 5 S = 125 ). (d) Mean outer wait ( 𝒮 = 1 3 5 S = 135 ). (e) Mean inner wait ( 𝒮 = 1 3 5 S = 135 ). (f) Probability of outer wait ( 𝒮 = 1 3 5 S = 135 ).
